narrative:
Alexander Township has 1,890 registered voters, with 49.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.8%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.6 percentage points.
